items.title: HALEU enrichment begins at the American Centrifuge plant in southern Ohio
items.blurb: American Centrifuge Operating (ACO), a subsidiary of Centrus Energy, has started enriching uranium hexafluoride gas to high-assay low-enriched uranium (HALEU) levels at the Department of Energy’s enrichment facility in…

items.title: Rolls-Royce SMR advances plans at two more Czech sites
items.blurb: An MoU with ČEZ and the Czech Ministry of Industry and Trade will allow site preparation to begin at two additional SMR sites.

items.title: Federal Court Upholds NRC’s Generic Severe-Accident Review for Nuclear Plant License Renewals
items.blurb: A federal appeals court has upheld the Nuclear Regulatory Commission’s (NRC’s) use of a generic environmental analysis for nuclear plant license renewals, rejecting claims that the agency failed to adequately consider…
